title: Kizaru Lands on Egghead
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Vegapunk, Unknown person #6, Luffy, Nami as The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.
scene: The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Oh, okay then.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That's a relief...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even so, we're still grate. Full to you S-snake!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thank you for un- doing the petrifica- lion on us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's strain- GE. I don't remember pro- gramming her to act like that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hancock!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These are my comrades! You have to undo your powers on them!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please you're the only one that can save them!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Okay! I will undo it! So please stop staring at my eyes directly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: WAHA- HAHA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's the perfect copy of Hancock! She looks down on everybody else, except Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's funny to know that the Seraphim based on her has the same emotions towards Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Very interest- ting... so these emotions...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: are considered to be one of the pieces of in- formation transferred through the Lineage Factor during the old- wing process...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Thank you again, Hancock!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: KYAH!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: D-Did you just say that you love me?!

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: Stella!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Although the comms system is working again...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I still can't open the frontier dome!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can't escape here if we can't disable the barrier...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's useless!!! I locked everything with a password!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And here's another bad news for you! I didn't share that info with your brains* and I don't plan on telling it either!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You're starting to get on my nerves!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hahahaha!! That password and the world government are the two armors that protect me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ahhh... I'm starting to get hungry!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Grrrr, why you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: We're surrounded from every side, Stella.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The fleet comprises 100 ships and nearly 30,000 Marines on board.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes, we have a dire situation on our hands...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Here you go, Stussy! Do you want a cup of coffee?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You said your. Name was Nami? You're the Navigator of the crew, correct?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yes!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The log pose is not pointing to a new destination yet but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think we can still follow the other directions it recorded in Wano...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One of them is pointing north-east from here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Ahh yes, that's where Elbaf is.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ELBAA- AFF!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We're finally going there?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've been dreaming of going there ever since! The island of the Giants!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Elbaaf BAF... Elbaaf BAF... It's surely to be big... and the people there too....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Would you quit staring at me?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luckily for us, your ship is already on the labophase stratum...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But since the island is surrounded completely by a marine blockade...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's impossible for us to escape from the coast!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: North East

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have to go north-east to the other side of the island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fortunately, the vegaforce 01 is already stationed next to your ship.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Veget force

summary: This part advances the Egghead Siege Begins through 49 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
